form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming raced on the pace when 2nd of 12 at this track on February 25 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Rainbow Seven carrying 61kg at $7.10. Last start 5th of 12 at this track on March 18 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Aurio with 52.5kg at $19. Top-three candidate.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after nine months second last of 12 at this track on March 25 over 1200m, 6 len behind Honest Witness with 60.5kg at $44. Previously second-up 5th of 14 at Sha Tin on November 9 2024 over 1600m, 1.5 len behind Voyage Samurai with 54kg at $11. Will need to improve sharply to figure.

Drawn the inside and he can get back to winning ways.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 2nd of 12 at this track on March 25 over 1200m, head behind Honest Witness carrying 58kg at $3.50. The start before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 12 at this track on March 11 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Lucky Mcqueen carrying 58.5kg at $2.20. Has been strong since coming to this track and trip recently and is easy to like.

form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Finished off last campaign couldn't go on with it; ran last of 12 at this track on October 15 over 1200m, 22 len behind King Glorioso carrying 58kg at $91. When resuming last campaign ran last of 14 at Sha Tin on June 22 over 1000m, 23 len behind Lightness Of Music carrying 57.5kg at $119. Hard to have on what we've seen from him so far.
